title: More Menu (Part 1/2)
heading: Announcements

| Notification issued by the Revenue Department regarding public hearing with the land owners by the Social Impact Assessment Study Team. | Sending of notification issued by the Revenue Department vide No – F.09(07)-REV/ACQ/VI/25 dated, 26/03/2026 regarding public hearing with the land owners by the Social Impact Assessment Study Team in connection with acquisition of land for widening of Existing Road from Women’s College Hostel Gate to Power House Chowmohani under Mouja Agartala, Sheet No. 14, Sadar, West Tripura. | 26/03/2026 | 31/05/2026 | |
| Notification issued by the Revenue Department regarding public hearing with the land owners by the Social Impact Assessment Study Team. | Sending of notification issued by the Revenue Department vide No – F.09(08)-REV/ACQ/VI/25 dated, 26/03/2026 regarding public hearing with the land owners by the Social Impact Assessment Study Team in connection with acquisition of land for development of Agartala City (Old Motor Stand Petrol Pump) under Mouja Agartala, Sheet No. 19/p, Sadar, West Tripura. | 26/03/2026 | 31/05/2026 | |
| Details Of Nodal Officer Under West Tripura District Prevention Of Sexual Harassment. | Details Of Nodal Officer Under West Tripura District Prevention Of Sexual Harassment. | 12/05/2025 | 12/05/2026 | |
| The Counting of Votes in connection with the General TTAADC Election, 2026 shall take place on 17th April, 2026 from 8.00 AM onwards under West Tripura District. | The Counting of Votes in connection with the General TTAADC Election, 2026 shall take place on 17th April, 2026 from 8.00 AM onwards under West Tripura District.
